name: Nitro Skylanders
description: Nitro Skylanders are characters introduced in Skylanders: Swap Force that are mostly associated with speed. They have a yellow-and-white checker color scheme. They were exclusively sold at Target stores.
biography: Nitro Skylanders are characters introduced in Skylanders: Swap Force that are mostly associated with speed. They have a yellow-and-white checker color scheme. They were exclusively sold at Target stores.

story.content: Nitro Skylanders are characters introduced in Skylanders: Swap Force that are mostly associated with speed. They have a yellow-and-white checker color scheme. They were exclusively sold at Target stores.

trivia: Nitro Krypt King is currently the only Nitro Skylander who doesn't possess any speed moves.
Nitro is a term used for a chemical makes cars move faster than normal, and Nitro variants have checkered patterns in their design, a symbol for racing.
Strangely there are no Nitro Skylanders for Skylanders: SuperChargers.
There are currently no core Nitro Skylanders.
gameplay: Nitro Skylanders are characters that are mostly associated with speed. They have a yellow-and-white checker color scheme. Nitro Krypt King is currently the only Nitro Skylander who doesn't possess any speed moves.

basic.name: Various
basic.content: Nitro Skylanders possess various attacks unique to each character, though they are mostly associated with speed.
